sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43953" key="eu)qe/atos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐθέᾱτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">θεάομαι</etym>) <sense id="n43953.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">easy to be seen</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:5:150" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.150</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
